Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, To Produce Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Rachel Hallam, Esq. 415-434-3400 Kletter Law for Plaintiff.
Jessica Quarless, Esq. 415-677-3136 Littler Mendelson for Defendant. (In-person)

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received on the discovery motion only. The Court adopts the tentative ruling on the Motion to Stay Proceedings pending appeal.

ARGUED. Ms. Hallam requests the Court to asopt its tentative ruling.
Ms. Quarless presents arguments; Counsel states they will provide substantive responses; contests sanctions, pursuing arbitration, stay pending appeal, not to impose sanctions or to defer sanctions until Appeal is resolved, acted with substantial justification. The Court comments; shares concerns re appeal, arbitration, a stay.
Ms. Quarless responds.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - Plaintiff Eduardo Reynoso's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, To Produce Documents, And For Sanctions is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
